_source: NIST SP 800-61r2/r3, MITRE D3FEND, UAV security surveys (public)
_key_rule: active confirmed compromise -> containment-first (Isolate->Evict). observe-first is opt-in exception, never default.

compromise.rationale: propagating foothold; dwell=swarm blast radius (NIST 3.3.1; D3FEND Isolate->Evict)

non_compromise_probing.rationale: no state change (adversarial-ML probing, side-channel) -> detect+strengthen

non_compromise_tamper.rationale: firmware tamper / prompt-injection = control-loop integrity broken (SI-7)

jamming.rationale: external threat, no host to evict -> preserve availability then locate (UAV survey)

unknown.rationale: NIST 3.3.1: act on predetermined strategy under ambiguity, never indefinite passive
